decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to lock down the opponent's options and control the game. By using cards like Trinisphere and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and prevent them from acting effectively. Additionally, cards like Grim Monolith and Urza's lands provide the resources needed to quickly ramp up and establish a strong board presence. The inclusion of Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Planar Nexus adds an extra layer of control, making it difficult for the opponent to mount a comeback.

The deck focuses on utilizing lands to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategies. It includes cards like Life from the Loam, Exploration, and Crop Rotation to maximize land advantage. The key strategy involves creating a lock with Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage, while also using disruptive cards like Wasteland and Pithing Needle to control the opponent's resources. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently using lands and disrupting their game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to create a prison-like control over the game. It uses powerful artifacts like Karn, the Great Creator and Urza's Saga to disrupt the opponent's strategy and lock down the board. With cards like Manifold Key and Voltaic Key, the deck can manipulate artifacts to its advantage while generating mana with cards like Grim Monolith and Urza's Workshop. The goal is to establish a dominant board presence and overwhelm the opponent with big threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, Eye of the Storms.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Amped Raptor and Ocelot Pride to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes disruptive cards like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also features versatile cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment for additional flexibility in dealing with different threats. The mana base includes efficient lands like Arid Mesa and Wasteland to ensure consistent mana production. Overall, the deck aims to win through a combination of fast, aggressive plays and disruption of the opponent's game plan.

The main concept of this Aggro - Death's Shadow deck is to quickly lower your own life total to make Death's Shadow a powerful threat while disrupting your opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will. The deck also utilizes cards like Murktide Regent and Moonshadow to apply pressure and win the game quickly before the opponent can recover. The deck has a strong mana denial strategy with cards like Wasteland and Daze to keep the opponent on the back foot while you push for the win.

The deck focuses on quickly bringing powerful creatures back from the graveyard to the battlefield, using cards like Shallow Grave, Reanimate, and Animate Dead. By discarding key creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier with cards like Faithless Looting and Cabal Therapy, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats early in the game. The inclusion of disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Unmask helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual enable explosive plays and quick reanimation of creatures.

The deck focuses on locking down the opponent's resources using artifacts and control elements, such as Trinisphere and Karn, the Great Creator, while ramping up quickly with Urza lands and Grim Monolith. The key strategy is to establish a prison-like board state with cards like Planar Nexus and Candelabra of Tawnos, preventing the opponent from effectively playing their cards. This forces the opponent to play on the back foot, allowing the player to slowly build up their own resources with powerful cards like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn to ultimately win the game.

This deck aims to put pressure on the opponent quickly while disrupting their game plan with counterspells and land destruction. It utilizes powerful creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to showcase a high tempo strategy. With cards like Force of Will and Brainstorm, the deck seeks to control the game and maintain its aggressive presence on the battlefield. By efficiently utilizing cards like Lightning Bolt and Wasteland, the deck aims to maintain a constant level of pressure while disrupting the opponent's resources. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, then use spells like Reanimate, Shallow Grave, and Animate Dead to bring them back into play for a devastating combo. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Unmask and Thoughtseize to protect its game plan and disrupt opponents. Additionally, cards like Tinybones Joins Up and Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers provide additional card advantage and pressure. The deck aims to take advantage of graveyard interaction and powerful creatures to overwhelm opponents in the Legacy format.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively combo off by utilizing a variety of fast mana sources such as Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Simian Spirit Guide, along with card draw and graveyard recursion to quickly assemble the necessary pieces for a win. By milling through the deck using cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer, the goal is to dump the entire library into the graveyard and win the game with cards like Thassa's Oracle or Pact of Negation. The deck aims to win before the opponent has a chance to react or disrupt the combo.

The key strategy of this Aggro - Dragon Stompy deck is to disrupt the opponent's mana base using cards like Magus of the Moon, Blood Moon, and Chalice of the Void while ramping into powerful Dragon creatures like Fury and Broadside Bombardiers. The deck also utilizes artifact acceleration like Chrome Mox and Lotus Petal to quickly deploy threats and apply pressure. With a mix of fast mana sources, disruptive elements, and aggressive creatures, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and close out games quickly.

The deck focuses on utilizing lands for control and disruption, with cards like Dark Depths, Wasteland, and The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale to disrupt opponents' strategies. It also includes cards like Urza's Saga and Life from the Loam for consistent land development and recursion. The deck utilizes cards like Sylvan Library and Exploration for card advantage and ramp, while also including utility lands like Bojuka Bog and Maze of Ith for additional control. The deck aims to create a strong land base while disrupting opponents' strategies to control the game.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing lands with powerful effects such as Thespian's Stage, Dark Depths, and Maze of Ith. By repeatedly using Life from the Loam to bring back lands from the graveyard, the deck can effectively disrupt the opponent's strategy while building towards its own win condition. Cards like Exploration and Mox Diamond help to ramp and accelerate the deck's mana production, while cards like Sphere of Resistance and The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale slow down the opponent's plays. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast its opponents through land manipulation and control.

The deck focuses on locking down the opponent by using artifacts to create a prison-like effect on the battlefield. With cards like Trinisphere and Urza's Saga, it aims to control the game by limiting the opponent's options and resources. Key cards like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Karn, the Great Creator provide powerful control abilities and ways to further disrupt the opponent's strategies. Additionally, the deck includes powerful artifact creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Cityscape Leveler to close out the game once control has been established.

This deck focuses on cheating powerful creatures into play early through cards like Sneak Attack and Show and Tell. By utilizing powerful combo pieces like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently. With a mix of counterspells like Force of Will and disruption like Flusterstorm, the deck aims to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes cards like Brainstorm and Ponder to help dig for crucial combo pieces and lands, ensuring a consistent and explosive gameplay.

The main concept of this Combo - Reanimator deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand, Archon of Cruelty, and Atraxa, Grand Unifier using cards like Faithless Looting and Unmask, then bring them back onto the battlefield using spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The deck also utilizes powerful discard spells like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By executing this strategy efficiently, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and quickly secure victory.
